form.formComment: Last start finished seventh in a Special conditions H on March 31 over 425m at Bendigo behind Paw Ortiz, beaten 21 lengths (25.33). Didn't show up last start but give her another chance.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Improved two runs back to score then won again last start over 425m at Bendigo (24.28), beating Harry Zoom. Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved two runs back to score then won again last start over 425m at Bendigo (24.28), beating Harry Zoom. Form strong and a huge chance to register the hat-trick.

form.formComment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 3.5 lengths fourth (19.58) over 350m at Healesville. Has ability and can run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, weakening late to finish a 3.5 lengths fourth (19.58) over 350m at Healesville. Has ability and can run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Raced approaching winning post.
Checked and lost ground at 150m mark.

form.formComment: Hasn't raced since finishing in the minors over 450m at this track in 25.82 ten weeks ago. Has had two fresh up runs and has recorded the one placing. Will need everything to go right.

form.formComment: Jumps from box 5 for the first time after scoring at Healesville (19.50) in a T3 RSTW. Appeals as a leading chance in this.
